auth.welcomeDesc: Sign in to manage your projects or create a new account.
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Build a professional brand and storefront in seconds with Cuclify. Just describe your idea.
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.

genesis.title: Design Genesis Engine
genesis.description: Describe your store concept, and our AI will build the entire brand and storefront for you.
genesis.promptPlaceholder: e.g., 'A premium coffee brand for young professionals with a minimalist aesthetic'

studio.title: Store Studio
studio.subtitle: Convora Store Engine
studio.longDescription: Type a plain-language edit. The studio converts it into StoreConfig mutations, validates them, and rerenders the live preview without generating React code.
studio.askAIDesc: Describe any change you want for your store.
studio.noMutation: No prompt has been applied yet.
studio.mutationEmpty: Mutations will appear here after a prompt is applied.
